title: Yevel 2 (Joke)
wikitext:
'''Yevel 2''' is the 2nd level of the Yerooms. {{Class 3}} == Description ==
[[File:Yevel 2.jpg|Pop's Home]] An image of '''Yevel 2'''.
Maintained inside the limited space of a stadium, '''Yevel 2''' mainly consists of an exhibition composed by Ye himself inside a stadium, composed of an abandoned and burned house, seemingly reconstituted. A mirroring puddle of water surrounding it ripples inconsistently, caused by the steps of those who wander by. Thick smoke envelops the whole building. Apart from them, fog machines haphazardly scattered around a platform — which maintains an exhibition on top of it — expel vapor from an unknown substance at random intervals, which fuses with the smoke coming from the house. In an eerie and silent ambience, the performance will start. The platform is slightly elevated from the field of the stadium and is thought to be exclusive for the presentation itself. The performance seems to be equal to all the wanderers who pass through the level. According to early reports, only one person is allowed in the level at a time, excluding the entities already present. The display seems to be consistent and invariant. As a wanderer comes across the level, it begins. From the arbitrarily placed speakers around the stadium, a showcase of [[Ye (Joke)|Ye]]'s most unstable works commences. The roamer present may stay for the complete demonstration, patiently listening to rock-influenced melodies. Simultaneously, Ye and his precious guests display a dance interpretation of the tunes. Gradually, the elements of the level corrode, signaling the end of the presentation. The structure of the stadium crumbles, as the sound also starts to present signals that it will be nullified. The fog machines begin to malfunction, shortly before the house restarts burning. As the entities circle the house and leave individually, Ye enters the burning house, engulfed by the flames, and presumably noclips into the next level. Soon, the watcher is left with an unnerving silence around the area, as the purpose of the level is fulfilled; Ye complements Level DONDA, as what seems like the aftermath of the episodes in its setting..
'''?:''' Great. First an open field, now this. Ye's going crazy again

''[Ye leaves the burning house, witnessing the wanderer.] '' ----'''YE:''' Pop's home, I ain't getting frisk ----'''?:''' Knew I'd find you here
'''?:''' You should go back to chasing Kim, this whole Backrooms thing just isn't for you, my brother ----'''YE:''' I put your security at risk
''[Ye approaches the wanderer carefully.]'' ----'''?:''' My security? Your ex cheated you with a clown, you're beefing with the wrong guy ----'''YE: '''Never take the family picture off the fridge
'''YE:''' Never stand between a man and his kids

''[Ye continues to approach them, with an aggressive stance.]'' ----'''?:''' Yeezy, maybe we can talk better about this, we really aren't in the best situation to fight
''[Punches are heard soon after, accompanied by screams, presumably from the wanderer. The recording goes silent briefly.] '' ----'''YE:''' We don't get paid enough for this ----'''... ''' ----'''KING VAMP:''' I got me some thots
'''KING VAMP:''' They thought I was gay (slatt, woah)
==Entities == Unlike [[Yevel 1]], '''Yevel 2''' has a larger diversity of entities, although it has fewer entities in general; as a result, many of them weren't reported properly to be documented as individual entities, despite taking part in the performance. Apart from Ye, the main entity, a new being that plays a key role in the presentation makes its debut: King Vamp. ===Ye=== [[Ye (Joke)|Ye]] is the main performer of the '''Yevel 2''' course. Very irritated due to unknown factors, Ye can often be seen throwing his microphones around the platform, only to pick them up shortly after. Without any of his iconic masks, his outfit is mainly black, complementing the aura of the level and matching with the other entities. ===King Vamp=== King Vamp is, presumably, one of Ye's prized collaborations on the level, presenting the experience alongside him. Also with a black outfit, Vamp wears black makeup over his eyes and red makeup over his mouth, rocking a goth-like look, occasionally accompanied by unidentified grunts. The entity appears to be somewhat disoriented, frequently tripping through the stage. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances=== This level can be reached by staying through the presentation delivered on [[Yevel 1]]. ===Exits=== Entering the burning house after contemplating the exhibition on '''Yevel 2''' will lead one to [[Yevel 3]]. {{Collapse|initial='''> Open Author & Licensing Information'''|final='''> Close Author & Licensing Information'''|body= '''Author:''' [[User:OGominho|OGominho]], grammatical corrections by [[User:Gorped|Gorped]]
}} [[Category:Levels]] [[Category:Joke]] [[Category:Joke Levels]] [[Category:The Yerooms]]
